hooks.command: SKILLS_LINK="$HOME/.agents/skills/paperer-skill-plugin"; if [ -L "$SKILLS_LINK" ]; then PLUGIN_ROOT="$(cd "$(readlink "$SKILLS_LINK")/../.." 2>/dev/null && pwd)"; else PLUGIN_ROOT="$HOME/plugins/paperer-skill-plugin"; fi; [ -x "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session-start" ] && exec "${PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/session-start" || exit 0
